eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 03:14 AM ON MAR 1, 2026 Effective until 11:14 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A SAFE Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. Gilbert Police Department is looking for 75 year old Prentice Mc Cray, Jr.  Prentice is a black male, 6 feet 1 inches tall, 270 pounds, with gray hair and brown eyes.  Prentice was last seen at 4:00 PM on 2/28/26 driving a white in color 2018 Ford Edge bearing AZ license plate V0A6LD near Guadalupe and Power Roads in Gilbert, Arizona.  He was last seen wearing blue pants, a black shirt and blue shoes.  Prentice suffers from a condition which can cause him to become confused and disoriented.  If you have seen Prentice, please contact the Gilbert Police Department at 480-503-6500 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
